reports.greeting: We're holding steady in Sioux Falls with 726 pending sales and a list-to-sale ratio of 98.3%, which tells us the market remains balanced and predictable. Mortgage rates are the conversation starter with every client right now, so Kyle Swiden at Plains Commerce Bank is ready to walk through spring refinancing options that could save thousands. Know your labor data and mortgage fundamentals cold, because that knowledge converts hesitant buyers into confident clients.

marketStats.headline: Sioux Falls market stats this week
bullets: Median sale price: $325,000. average days on market: 80. list to sale ratio: 98.3%.
Pending count is flat versus last week. Steady week.

items.title: Health Care
items.summary: Healthcare expansion shapes how people choose where to live and work in Sioux Falls. Your clients need to understand these trends when buying or selling.

items.title: Food & Drink
items.summary: New restaurants and food concepts drive foot traffic and property values in neighborhoods. Smart agents track these openings to position listings effectively.

items.title: Development
items.summary: Construction and development projects directly impact land availability and future property appreciation. Amy Stockberger Real Estate agents stay ahead by monitoring what gets built next.

mortgage.headline: Rates and mortgage chatter
mortgage.summary: Logan Mohtashami breaks down the labor data and mortgage rates to show us what's actually driving housing demand right now. You need to understand these numbers because they directly impact your clients' buying power and your pipeline. The jobs report tells us whether people have stable income to qualify for loans, and mortgage rates tell us what their payments look like. Amy Stockberger Real Estate agents stay ahead by knowing these metrics cold. Your clients are asking about affordability, rates, and job security. When you understand the connection between labor data and housing demand, you stop guessing and start closing deals. This is the intelligence that separates top producers from everyone else in South Dakota.
keyPoints: Labor data determines client buying power and loan qualification
Mortgage rates directly affect monthly payments and housing demand
Understanding economic indicators gives you a competitive edge in sales conversations

spotlight.name: Plains Commerce Bank
spotlight.pitch: Spring refinancing can save you thousands over the life of your loan. Kyle Swiden and Plains Commerce Bank know South Dakota homeowners inside and out. Talk to them about whether a rate adjustment makes sense for your situation.
